categories.label: Leg Bet Winnings
categories.description: Total coins earned from correct leg betting tiles across all legs

categories.label: Leg Bet Penalties
categories.description: Coins lost from incorrect leg bets (enter as positive, subtracted automatically)

categories.label: Overall Winner Bet
categories.description: Coins earned from correct overall winner bet (8/5/3/2/1 based on order)

categories.label: Overall Loser Bet
categories.description: Coins earned from correct overall loser bet (8/5/3/2/1 based on order)

categories.label: Wrong Overall Bets
categories.description: Coins lost from incorrect overall winner/loser bets (1 coin each)

categories.label: Desert Tile Income
categories.description: Coins earned when camels landed on your desert tile

categories.label: Rolling Income
categories.description: Coins earned from rolling pyramid dice (1 coin per roll)
